scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:mock" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin
scripts.check:all: npm run check:mock && npm run typecheck:user && npm run typecheck:admin && npm run lint:user && npm run lint:admin
scripts.test:mock: node tests/test_order_pricing.js && node tests/test_service_request_lifecycle.js && node tests/test_technician_rules.js && node tests/test_enum_contract.js
